message:
fix(persist): write NULL sql for autoindex entries in sqlite_master

Autoindex entries (sqlite_autoindex_*) were written to sqlite_master
with a non-NULL sql column containing CREATE UNIQUE INDEX statements.
Stock SQLite stores these as NULL and rejects CREATE INDEX with the
reserved sqlite_ prefix, making the schema entry invalid.

Changed master_entries sql column to Option<String>. Autoindexes now
write None (serialized as SqliteValue::Null). Explicit indexes are
unchanged.

Found during post-commit code review of #55 fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
